theme_and_archetype.description: Cinematic, moody, expensive feel. Designed for Italian small shop owners. The UI should resemble high-end editorial apps like SSENSE or FARFETCH: deep blacks, lots of negative space, elegant typography, and a distinct focus on the imagery. Accent colors are used exclusively for 'magical' AI actions.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-light tracking-tighter leading-tight
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-normal tracking-tight leading-snug
hierarchy.label: text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-[#A1A1AA]

typography.pairing_strategy: Radical contrast: Extremely elegant, thin serif for large editorial headings; sterile, geometric, clean sans-serif for UI elements, labels, and numbers.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use 2-3x more spacing than typical apps. The 'White Space' (even though it's dark mode) must feel luxurious.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento Grid Protocol. Mode B (Control Room) adapted for imagery. Tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6) but heavy internal padding.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-none or max rounded-sm to maintain a sharp, editorial high-fashion aesthetic.

buttons.primary: Solid white background, black text, sharp corners (rounded-none), hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors.
buttons.secondary: Transparent background, 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2), white text, hover:bg-white/5.
buttons.magic_button: The ✨ 'Genera Outfit Realistico' button must use the 'accent_magic' gradient background, sharp corners, and a pulsating drop-shadow using 'accent_magic_glow'. Include haptic scale feedback (scale down on tap). Text should be bold and bright.

cards_and_surfaces.style: Flat #121212 background, 1px subtle border (border-white/10), no heavy drop shadows in dark mode.
cards_and_surfaces.hover_state: Slight lift (-translate-y-1), subtle increase in border opacity (border-white/30).

inputs_and_forms.style: Shadcn UI customized: bg-transparent, bottom-border only (or very subtle full border), text-white, focus:border-white focus:ring-0. Minimalist forms.

navigation.style: Glassmorphism header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#050505]/70) with a 1px bottom border.

icons.style: Thin or Light weight to match high-end fashion editorial vibes.

motion_and_interactions.general: Smooth, deliberate transitions. No bouncy effects. Use Framer Motion for fade-ins and slide-ups.
motion_and_interactions.loading_state: When generating outfit, use a satisfying, immersive loading screen with particle effects, shimmering text ('Creazione della magia in corso...'), and a fluid progress indicator.
motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle brightness increase or a 1.02x scale for images.

key_screens.name: Onboarding / Login
key_screens.description: Dark luxury background, elegant typography, simple 'Accedi con Google' / Phone buttons. A high-fashion background image (dark_luxury_bg) blended into the dark UI.

key_screens.name: Shop Dashboard (Galleria Capi)
key_screens.description: Grid of uploaded clothes. Minimalist UI. Large 'Carica Capo' primary button.

key_screens.name: Magic Outfit Generator Form
key_screens.description: Step-by-step or chip-based selection for models (uomo/donna/età/corporatura), pose, and background. Visual chips with icons. The massive ✨ Genera Outfit Realistico button sits at the bottom, sticky.

key_screens.name: Results Gallery
key_screens.description: 4-8 image bento grid showcasing the generated fashion models. Sharp edges, high resolution focus.

key_screens.name: Post-Generation Studio
key_screens.description: Edit screen for a single generated image. Bottom sheet or side panel with tools: Rimuovi Sfondo, Testo (Prezzo/Nome), Filtri Instagram.

image_urls.description: Abstract dark luxury fashion texture, deep black with subtle cinematic lighting.
Glowing iridescent magical aura for the magic button or loading states.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly use the Italian language (UI in italiano) across the entire application as requested.
Ensure Dark Mode is the default and only theme.
Use Framer Motion for the UI transitions and particularly the generation loading sequence.
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all interactive and key informational elements (e.g., data-testid='login-button', data-testid='genera-outfit-button').
Utilize standard Tailwind classes and Shadcn components, heavily customized to remove the 'default SaaS' look, favoring sharp edges and zero-to-minimal border radius.
Use the provided media URLs for all visual placeholders. Do not use generic placeholder services.
Keep standard inputs looking like fashion editorial lines (bottom border only where possible, or very subtle boxes).
